}

function solve(piles) {

    piles.sort((a,b) => a - b);

    const n = piles.length;

    const k = n / 3;

    let sum = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < k; i++) {

        sum += piles[n - 2 - 2*i];

    }

    return sum;

}
